summary: Comprehensive testing of VivaLusa Phase 3 features: Multi-currency support with live ECB exchange rates and Admin Sales & Stock analytics. Backend APIs all passing (17/17). Frontend currency conversion working perfectly across all pages. Admin analytics dashboard functional with complete data display.

design_issues.issue: Session timeout during extended testing - admin session expires requiring re-login

passed_tests: Currency selector shows EUR by default
Currency switching to USD with correct conversion (€89.00 → $104.86)
Currency switching to GBP with correct conversion (€89.00 → £77.42)
Currency preference persists in localStorage after page refresh
GET /api/currency/rates returns live exchange rates with EUR base
Product prices display in selected currency on Shop page
Product prices display in selected currency on Product Detail page
Product prices display in selected currency in Cart
Admin Sales & Stock tab displays total revenue, orders, products, stock
Admin Stock by Category shows progress bars for Skincare, Makeup, Fragrance
Admin Full Inventory table shows all products with prices and stock
POST /api/upload/image endpoint works for admin users
Admin product creation modal opens with image upload button
All existing backend APIs still functional (products, auth, shipping, checkout)
